name: rerank_create
description: Rerank a list of documents by relevance to a query. Returns a relevance score and ordering index for each document, useful for improving search result quality in RAG pipelines.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query for ranking documents.
parameters.example: What animals can I find near Peru?

parameters.name: documents
parameters.description: List of documents as strings or objects with custom fields to be ranked.
example: The llama is a domesticated South American camelid.
The giant panda is endemic to China.

parameters.name: top_n
parameters.description: Number of top results to return.

parameters.name: return_documents
parameters.description: Whether to include the supplied documents in the response.

parameters.name: rank_fields
parameters.description: Specific JSON keys to rank by when documents are objects. Defaults to all keys.

body.query: What animals can I find near Peru?
documents: The llama is a domesticated South American camelid.
The giant panda is endemic to China.

document.text: The llama is a domesticated South American camelid.
